description: Installs Visual Studio Code via Chocolatey. Supports Stable and Insiders editions.

messages.scriptDisabled: VS Code installation is disabled in config.
messages.editionPrompt: Which edition(s) would you like to install?
messages.uninstallFailed: {name} uninstall failed -- package may need manual removal.
messages.uninstallComplete: Uninstall complete. Package removed, tracking purged.

commands.all: Install VS Code (default, with edition prompt)
commands.uninstall: Uninstall completely, remove tracking, clean up
